license.world-cities: Capital data from UN Statistics Division and Wikipedia (public-domain reference, MIT-aligned)
license.mawaqit-slugs: Curated metadata derived from public Mawaqit profile pages (slugs only)
license.city-method-overrides: Manual, cited per row in scripts/data/city-method-overrides.json
license.population-centers: Manual, sourced from UN World Cities + World Population Review 2024-2025

notes: Cities sorted by bbox area ascending. detectLocation() linear-scans this array and returns the first bbox that contains (lat, lon) — smallest match wins. Each city carries an institutional `source` (mawaqit | national-authority | inherited) so apps can attribute timetable provenance to users. Method overrides are city-level institutional decisions documented in scripts/data/city-method-overrides.json with citation strings.

altMethods.source: Iraqi-Lebanese Shia diaspora — Islamic Center of America (Dearborn) and other Najaf-Karbala diaspora institutions follow Tehran-style timing for the Twelver Shia community

source.institution: Jordan Ministry of Awqaf, Islamic Affairs and Holy Places

altMethods.source: Higher Islamic Shia Council of Lebanon (al-Majlis al-Islami al-Shi'i al-A'la) — published Twelver Shia Imsakiyya for southern suburbs (Dahieh) and eastern Bekaa communities
Aladhan world-default for Bosnia and Herzegovina
Some Bangsamoro diaspora apps (Muslim Pro defaults via NCMF Manila offices) use ISNA-aligned 15°/15° as a North America-influenced compromise; minority practice.
South-Asian-origin diaspora Hanafi-Deobandi convention; some Bradford mosques (notably Deobandi-affiliated) follow Karachi 18°/18° directly
Aladhan world-default for Bosnia and Herzegovina
Aladhan world-default for Bosnia and Herzegovina
NCMF Manila-aligned ISNA 15°/15° used by some diaspora apps (Muslim Pro).
India country-default (AIMPLB Hanafi-majority via Jamiat Ulema-e-Hind / Deobandi convention) — default Hanafi Asr applies to Hanafi-minority North Indian diaspora communities in Kerala

source.institution: University of Islamic Sciences, Karachi (Shafi Asr)

altMethods.source: Iranian Azeri Sunni Hanafi minority — Sunni mosques in northwestern Iran (West Azerbaijan, Ardabil Sunni neighbourhoods) follow Diyanet-aligned Hanafi convention via Turkish religious presence

Lucknow has historically large Twelver Shia population (Awadh / Nawabi heritage; Bara Imambara, Chota Imambara) following Sistani/marja' Imsakiyya in Tehran-method shape — applies to ~30% of Lucknow's Muslim population per regional Shia-affairs estimates
